content: sd block/unblock commands: block.ts uses --by flag; unblock.ts uses --from (specific) or --all (closed blockers). Both maintain bidirectional blocks/blockedBy arrays atomically under lock. Import Command with import type for biome compliance.

sd label command: label.ts uses dep.ts subcommand pattern (add/remove/list/list-all). Labels are free-form strings, normalized lowercase/trimmed on write. Stored as labels?: string[] on Issue — empty arrays become undefined (same as blocks/blockedBy). sd create uses --labels (comma-separated), sd update uses --add-label/--remove-label/--set-labels (comma-separated, applied in order: set→add→remove). sd list filters: --label (AND), --label-any (OR), --unlabeled.
